name: material-ui-nextjs
tagline: Guides wiring Material UI into Next.js App/Pages Router: cache providers, fonts, CSS layers, Link, URL state.
verdict: Concise, well-scoped index skill delegating detail to AGENTS.md/reference.md; no security issues found in the visible content. Missing NOT-for exclusions risks misfiring against its near-identical sibling skill (material-ui-styling). Referenced files cannot be verified without a file inventory.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion language anywhere; overlaps with sibling skill material-ui-styling, risking misfire between them.
